classified_signals.title: NVIDIA Korea Launches AI Sovereign Cloud Hub in Pangyo -- 10,000 H200 GPUs Dedicated to Korean AI Startups
classified_signals.impact_assessment: NVIDIA establishing a sovereign AI cloud in Korea signals major shift in global AI compute geography. Dedicated H200 GPU cluster for Korean startups could accelerate domestic AI ecosystem by 2-3 years.

classified_signals.title: Korea Household Debt Reaches Record 1,900 Trillion Won -- BOK Warns of Systemic Risk Threshold
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Household debt at 107% of GDP crosses BOK internal systemic risk threshold. Rate cuts create contradictory pressure -- easing financial burden but fueling further borrowing.

classified_signals.title: Korea Birth Rate Falls to 0.55 in February 2026 -- New Record Low, Population Decline Accelerates
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Monthly birth rate dropping below 0.55 indicates demographic crisis is accelerating beyond all government projections. Current trajectory implies population halving within 50 years.

classified_signals.title: Korea National Assembly Passes AI Basic Act -- First Comprehensive AI Legislation in Asia
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Korea becomes the first Asian country with comprehensive AI legislation. The act creates a regulatory framework covering AI liability, transparency requirements, and high-risk AI classification.

classified_signals.title: SK Hynix Achieves 321-Layer NAND Flash -- World Record Vertical Integration
classified_signals.impact_assessment: SK Hynix breaks its own world record with 321-layer NAND flash, maintaining Korea dominance in memory semiconductor technology critical for AI data center expansion.

classified_signals.title: Korean Won Hits 1,420 against USD -- Export Competitiveness vs. Import Inflation Dilemma
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Won depreciation beyond 1,400 creates dual pressure: boosting export competitiveness but inflating energy and raw material import costs. Consumer price inflation risk rising.

classified_signals.title: US-China Tech War Escalation: New Export Controls on AI Training Chips Target Korea Semiconductor Equipment
classified_signals.impact_assessment: New US export controls specifically targeting semiconductor manufacturing equipment used by Korean companies for China-bound chip production. Korea faces forced decoupling from China market.

classified_signals.title: Seoul Metropolitan Government Launches Free Universal Childcare from Age 0 -- Budget 3.2 Trillion Won
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Seoul free universal childcare represents the most aggressive local policy response to demographic crisis. If successful, could become national template.

classified_signals.title: KAIST Develops Room-Temperature Topological Quantum Processor Prototype -- 50-Qubit Operation Demonstrated
classified_signals.impact_assessment: First room-temperature topological quantum processor prototype from Korean research institute. If reproducible, could leapfrog current cryogenic quantum computing approaches.

classified_signals.title: Korean Air Pollution PM2.5 Drops 40% Over 5 Years -- Clean Air Policy Success but Yellow Dust Remains
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Significant air quality improvement demonstrates policy effectiveness, but transboundary yellow dust from China remains uncontrollable domestic variable.

classified_signals.title: Korean Startup Ecosystem Reaches 23 Unicorns -- AI and Biotech Lead Growth
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Korea unicorn count growth (from 18 in 2025) concentrated in AI and biotech sectors reflects structural economic diversification beyond conglomerate-led model.

classified_signals.title: Elderly Poverty Rate 43.8% -- OECD Worst, National Pension Reform Stalls in Assembly
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Korea elderly poverty worsens slightly (from 43.2% in Q4 2025) as pension reform remains politically deadlocked. Structural social safety net failure deepens.

classified_signals.title: Korean Buddhist Temple Stay Program Sees 300% Surge Among Gen Z -- Meaning Economy Grows
classified_signals.impact_assessment: Temple Stay surge among young Koreans signals growing meaning-seeking behavior amid economic pressure and social alienation. Potential precursor to values shift.
